\\[3pt]\parbox{\linewidth}{\footnotesize Same albedo decile edges as the TCCON stratification (Table~\ref{tab:driver-strata}). RMSE$_0$: anomaly-label RMSE with no correction applied; RMSE$_{\mathrm{DE}}$: held-out residual RMSE of the correction; frac.\ worse: fraction of footprints where applying the correction increases the error against the held-out anomaly label; $\langle z^2\rangle$: calibration ratio. The bright-surface failure signature seen against TCCON (frac.\ worse 0.50) is absent here, identifying the remaining bright-surface TCCON residual as a within-overpass common-mode component outside the anomaly target (Sect.~4.4).}
